name: Stickman: Fighter 3D
description: Enter the arena in Hamada Yedrab Stickman Fighter 3D Experience the classic stickman combat you love, now in a stunning 3D world with fluid physics and hard-hitting action. GAME MODES: Arcade Mode: Battle through 15 intense levels against increasingly smart AI opponents. 2-Player Versus: Challenge a friend on the same computer! BATTLE SYSTEM: Unleash combos, perform flying kicks, and dodge attacks in a dynamic 3D arena. POWER-UPS: Watch out for floating orbs that spawn during the fight: Red: Double Damage Blue: Super Speed Green: Health Restore Yellow: Invincibility
instructions: Player 1 Left Side Move W A S D Punch F Kick G Jump Spacebar Player 2 Right Side Move Arrow Keys Punch K Kick L Jump Right Shift General Pause Menu ESC Key
